grant_title: Charles H. Hood Foundation Child Health Research Grants
geographic_restrictions: New England area (Massachusetts, Connecticut, Rhode Island, Vermont, New Hampshire, Maine)
demographic_requirements: None specified; focuses on cutting-edge research and researchers in pediatric health
eligibility_summary: Open to institutions and researchers in the New England area conducting innovative pediatric health research with potential for high impact. Priority given to projects with higher risk but greater potential for breakthroughs.
